summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of MOVS mining platform. Backend API testing achieved 100% pass rate (20/20 tests). Frontend testing confirmed all core features working: magic link auth, browser-based PoW mining, wallet operations, send/receive, leaderboard, and block explorer. Mining successfully finds blocks in ~1-15 seconds with difficulty=20 bits. One minor UI issue identified with language toggle navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking EN language toggle may cause unexpected navigation to explorer page instead of just switching language
ui_bugs.impact: Language switching works but may navigate user away from current page

passed_tests: Backend: Health check returns ok
Backend: Network stats returns total_supply=1,000,000, current_reward=50, difficulty_bits=20
Backend: Magic link request creates token and returns dev_magic_link fallback
Backend: Magic link verification returns JWT and user with stable movs1... address
Backend: Token reuse correctly rejected with 400 'Token already used'
Backend: /auth/me returns authenticated user
Backend: /mine/challenge returns valid challenge with prev_hash, height, difficulty, reward
Backend: Valid PoW submission accepted and credits reward (computed nonce=212226 in Python)
Backend: Stale prev_hash correctly rejected with reason=stale_chain
Backend: Invalid nonce correctly rejected with reason=invalid_pow
Backend: /wallet returns address, balance, total_mined, blocks_mined
Backend: /wallet/send to another email auto-creates recipient, deducts sender, credits recipient
Backend: /wallet/send with insufficient balance returns 400
Backend: /wallet/send to self returns 400
Backend: /wallet/send with invalid recipient returns 400
Backend: /wallet/transactions returns history with direction field (in/out)
Backend: /leaderboard returns ranked miners with masked emails (***)
Backend: /blocks/recent returns blocks sorted by height desc
Backend: Supply cap respected (minted <= 1,000,000)
Frontend: Landing page loads with network stats panel showing 1,000,000 supply
Frontend: Navigation to login page works
Frontend: Login form accepts email and requests magic link
Frontend: Dev magic link displayed when email send fails (Resend sandbox)
Frontend: Magic link verification redirects to dashboard with JWT stored
Frontend: Dashboard requires auth (redirects to /login if not authenticated)
Frontend: All 4 dashboard tabs present (MINE, WALLET, SEND, HISTORY)
Frontend: MINE tab START MINING button starts Web Worker
Frontend: Mining finds block in ~1 second (difficulty=20, SHA-256 PoW in browser)
Frontend: Block submission to /api/mine/submit successful, balance increases by 50 MOVS
Frontend: Hashrate displays live during mining
Frontend: WALLET tab shows updated balance and total_mined after mining
Frontend: SEND tab allows entering recipient email + amount and submits successfully
Frontend: HISTORY tab shows mining_reward and send/receive entries with correct direction signs
Frontend: /leaderboard shows miners in ranked table
Frontend: /explorer shows recently mined blocks (height, miner, reward, hash, time)
Frontend: Logout button clears session and returns to landing
action_item_for_main_agent: One minor UI issue: Language toggle (EN button) may cause unexpected navigation to explorer page. Verify that clicking language toggle only changes language without navigating. Otherwise, all features working correctly.
